steps.text: Now it's time for a slimy task. (Throw frog).
Each contestant has one frog and one throw. The frog must land intact. Measurements taken from the line to the frog's nose.
Taylor threw it 31 m — the length of half a frog on a 30.95 m stick. Max threw it 12 m into a bush and argued it counted. 12m is the length of a really long cat.
Peter threw it 28 m with excellent form. Harry's frog escaped and was not recovered.
Overall: Peter 1st (28 m), Taylor 2nd furthest (31 m), but disqualified, then Max (12m), Harry's escaped, Charlie absent.
